name: Sandeep Singh
why_notable: Co-founded ProjectDiscovery with Bhomesh Koli. Core member of the team behind the ProjectDiscovery tool ecosystem — the set of composable Go tools (subfinder, nuclei, httpx, naabu, katana, dnsx) that collectively redefined open-source security automation. His handle pussycat0x appears across the ProjectDiscovery GitHub org as a core contributor to tools used by hundreds of thousands of security professionals.
